subject: [PATCH] btrfs: add remap-tree checks to check_block_group_item()

reviews.author: David Sterba
reviews.summary: Raised a concern about the potential issue of 64-bit/32-bit compatibility on various architectures. Suggested using sectorize_bits to avoid this problem.

2026-03-23.patch_summary: This patch adds write-time checks for block group items in the Btrfs file system, specifically related to the remap tree. It ensures that certain flags and values are consistent when the REMAP_TREE incompat flag is set.
